大发怎么看走势好不好【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100485_63779709<br>vk.com/topic-239100499_64636265<br>vk.com/topic-239100478_64367114<br>vk.com/topic-239100513_64053745<br>vk.com/topic-239100532_64477076<br>vk.com/topic-239100525_63779735<br>vk.com/topic-239100480_64939595<br>vk.com/topic-239100460_64939600<br>vk.com/topic-239100505_63779810<br>vk.com/topic-239100469_64636332<br>vk.com/topic-239100461_65516515<br>vk.com/topic-239100508_64367220<br>vk.com/topic-239100567_65311813<br>vk.com/topic-239100569_64636346<br>vk.com/topic-239100570_64939622<br>vk.com/topic-239090246_64198093<br>vk.com/topic-239100566_64198098<br>vk.com/topic-239061414_63863718<br>vk.com/topic-239100498_64367221<br>vk.com/topic-239100576_64198104<br>vk.com/topic-239079440_64939618<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64477197<br>vk.com/topic-239100578_64367251<br>vk.com/topic-239100512_64477198<br>vk.com/topic-239100507_65311839<br>vk.com/topic-239100506_64198195<br>vk.com/topic-239100501_65516638<br>vk.com/topic-239100504_63863837<br>vk.com/topic-239100511_65516639<br>vk.com/topic-239100516_64198243<br>vk.com/topic-239100519_64636478<br>vk.com/topic-239100474_63863846<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65516648<br>vk.com/to
